$description: Component tokens for Mobile Popover component - a contextual tooltip/onboarding card with a directional arrow pointer. Used to highlight features or guide users through onboarding flows. Supports 4 alignment positions (Top, Bottom, Left, Right), 3 arrow placements (Start, Center, End), and 2 step modes (Default = Done only, Multiple = Previous + Next + step counter). Figma Reference: Node ID 576-5625

$component.name: Popover
$component.description: A mobile popover/onboarding tooltip component that displays a white card with a directional arrow pointer. Contains an optional icon, bold heading, body description text, and an optional footer with action buttons. Used for feature highlights, onboarding tours, and contextual guidance. Fixed width of 266px with layout adapting based on arrow alignment.
$component.structure: White rounded card (8px radius) with drop shadow containing: optional icon (36px), heading row with optional close (X) button, body text paragraph, and optional footer with step counter and/or action buttons. A directional arrow pointer attaches to one edge of the card, pointing toward the triggering element.

alignment.top: Arrow points downward from bottom edge of card — card sits above the target
alignment.bottom: Arrow points upward from top edge of card — card sits below the target
alignment.left: Arrow points rightward from right edge of card — card sits to the left of the target
alignment.right: Arrow points leftward from left edge of card — card sits to the right of the target

arrow.center: Arrow centered on the aligned edge
arrow.start: Arrow offset toward the start (left/top) of the aligned edge
arrow.end: Arrow offset toward the end (right/bottom) of the aligned edge

steps.default: Single step — shows Done button only in footer
steps.multiple: Multi-step — shows step counter (e.g. 1 of 3) + Previous and Next buttons

usage.contexts: Feature highlights, onboarding tours, contextual tips, guided walkthroughs, product education flows
usage.features: Optional icon, optional close button, directional arrow with 12 position combinations, multi-step navigation with progress counter, single-step with Done action

container.$comment: Container tokens for the main popover card panel

width.description: Mobile popover container width - 266px fixed (no size variants)

radius.description: Mobile popover container border radius - 8px fully rounded card

padding.description: Mobile popover container padding - 16px all sides

gap.description: Mobile popover container gap between content sections (icon, heading, body, footer) - 8px

shadow.description: Mobile popover container shadow - shadow/lg - 0px 12px 16px -4px rgba(16,24,40,0.08), 0px 4px 6px -2px rgba(16,24,40,0.03)

arrow.$comment: Arrow pointer tokens - the directional triangle that points toward the trigger element. Width varies by alignment position and arrow placement.

height.description: Mobile popover arrow height - 6px (consistent across all positions)

center.description: Mobile popover arrow width for center placement (top/bottom center) - 16px

offset.description: Mobile popover arrow width for start/end placement on top/bottom edges - 36px

side.description: Mobile popover arrow width for start/end placement on left/right edges - 32px

color.description: Mobile popover arrow fill color - white, matches container background - #ffffff

content.$comment: Content area tokens - header row, heading text, and body description

header.$comment: Header row containing optional icon + heading text on the left, and optional close button on the right

gap.description: Mobile popover header gap between left content group and close button - 8px

size.description: Mobile popover header icon container size - 36px (square)
Mobile popover header close (X) button container size - 36px (square)

heading.$comment: Bold title text at the top of the popover content

typography.description: Mobile popover heading typography - 20px Bold, 30px line-height (font/size/4xl, font/weight/bold)

color.description: Mobile popover heading text color - neutral/gray-900 - #101828

typography.description: Mobile popover body text typography - 16px Regular, 24px line-height (font/size/2xl, font/weight/regular)

color.description: Mobile popover body text color - neutral/gray-500 - #667085

footer.$comment: Footer action area - conditionally shown. Default steps: Done button only. Multiple steps: step counter + Previous + Next buttons.

gap.description: Mobile popover footer gap between step counter and button group - 8px

steps.$comment: Step counter text shown in multiple-step mode (e.g. '1 of 3')

typography.description: Mobile popover steps counter typography - 15px Semibold, 20px line-height (font/size/xl, font/weight/semibold)

color.description: Mobile popover steps counter text color - neutral/gray-900 - #101828

button.$comment: Action button tokens shared across primary (Next/Done) and secondary (Previous) buttons in the popover footer. Buttons use a neutral gray color scheme specific to this component.

horizontal.description: Mobile popover footer button horizontal padding - 14px

vertical.description: Mobile popover footer button vertical padding - 8px

radius.description: Mobile popover footer button border radius - 8px

shadow.description: Mobile popover footer button shadow - shadow/xs - 0px 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.05)

typography.description: Mobile popover footer button typography - 14px Semibold, 20px line-height (font/size/lg, font/weight/semibold)

primary.$comment: Primary action button - Next (multiple steps) or Done (default step). Uses neutral gray/600 instead of brand primary — specific to popover component.

background.description: Mobile popover primary button background - neutral/gray-600 - #475467

color.description: Mobile popover primary button border color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467
Mobile popover primary button text color - neutral/white - #ffffff

secondary.$comment: Secondary action button - Previous (multiple steps only). White background with gray border.

background.description: Mobile popover secondary button background - neutral/white - #ffffff

color.description: Mobile popover secondary button border color - neutral/gray-300 - #d0d5dd
Mobile popover secondary button text color - neutral/gray-700 - #344054
